body.title: CLOSED: Igor goals tree — palace nodes concrete enough for NE synthesis
body.result: ALREADY DONE by CC: 3 palace nodes (palace.shared.igor.goals, .roadmap, .self-improvement-loop) + PR_GOAL_STRATEGIC_TICKET_PROCESSING facia. Worker-daemon grabbed this after restart; work was already complete.
body.description:
Igor has aspirational PR_GOAL_STRATEGIC_* entries in TWM (self-learning, goal-graph reasoning) but no concrete sub-goals the NE can synthesize into actions. Akien's goals_tree.20260507.md section 1.5 defines Igor's roadmap: 1.5a process tickets → 1.5b ticket processing on graph matrix → 1.5c design capability → 1.5d recursive self-improvement. Create palace nodes under a new path (e.g. palace.igor.goals.*) that mirror this tree with concrete, measurable next-states. Each node should name the current state, next milestone, and what 'done' looks like so the NE can produce a result when it integrates them. Also wire the top node as a high-salience TWM attractor so it competes with FACIA noise.

**Affected files:** adc.palace (INSERT via palace_write MCP), possibly clan.memory_palace for Igor-side goal attractor
**Design rules:** no-sqlite, palace-first
**Scope boundary:** Palace writes only. No cognition code changes.
**Test plan:** After insert, palace.igor.goals.* nodes readable; Igor's TWM shows goal attractor in relationship_drift; NE produces a narrative referencing one of the concrete milestones within 10 cycles.
